pgUrl.label: PostgreSQL URL
pgUrl.help: PostgreSQL connection string. Database must have pgvector extension installed.

embedding.baseUrl.label: Embedding API Base URL
embedding.baseUrl.help: OpenAI-compatible embedding endpoint. Point at your local Qwen3 node.

embedding.model.label: Embedding Model
embedding.model.help: Model name as loaded in your local inference server.

embedding.apiKey.label: Embedding API Key
embedding.apiKey.help: API key for the embedding endpoint. Use 'none' for local servers.

embedding.dimensions.label: Embedding Dimensions
embedding.dimensions.help: Vector dimensions for your embedding model. Qwen3 = 1536.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically capture important information from conversations.

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context before each run.

recallLimit.label: Recall Limit
recallLimit.help: Max memories to inject per run.

significanceThreshold.label: Significance Threshold
significanceThreshold.help: Minimum significance score (1-10) for auto-recall injection.
